productName: Slapple ( I/H ) - Flipside Gold BHO/Ethanol Extracted Disposable 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Slapple in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, a crisp, sweet apple flavor, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
